critic_raw:
Assessor A: Three gaps: fairness evaluation incomplete (equalized odds only), portfolio loss not verified, group calibration absent. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Assessor B: Equalized odds improvement is real and meaningful, but it doesn't tell us whether approval rates improve for protected groups or whether the model is calibrated by group for adverse-action reasons. These are required for a complete fair-lending evaluation. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Assessor C: The 1.1M-application dataset provides the basis for all three missing analyses. There is no data gap — only an analysis gap. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Synthesis: Unanimous empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: expected portfolio loss, approval rates by group, and group calibration
empirical_test.success_criterion: all three metrics meet their respective standards from existing retrospective data
empirical_test.failure_criterion: any of the three metrics fails its standard
